page_title: 10 Spring Dress Trends to Shop in 2025

sections.heading: The Butter Yellow Dress
sections.text: Butter yellow has quickly become a runway staple across spring and summer collections.

sections.heading: The Drop Waist Dress
sections.text: Drop-waist dresses elongate the silhouette and pair easily with minimalist flats. They deliver an unfussy but directional spring shape.

sections.heading: The Polka-Dot Dress
sections.text: Polka dots return with semi-sheer, draped, and strapless shapes that feel modern again.

sections.heading: Fashion-Forward Florals
sections.text: Floral dresses show up with unexpected silhouettes and styling that breaks from tradition.
